# Java Learning Resources (20)

> Official documentation, community tutorials, books, and tools for Java development.

## Official Oracle / OpenJDK

| Title | Type | Diff | Concepts | Author | Fresh | Off | Free | Lang |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [The Java Tutorials (dev.java)](https://dev.java/learn/) | 📝 Tutorial | 🟢 | Language basics, OOP, Generics, FP | Oracle / dev.java | 🔄 | ✅ | ✅ | ☕ |
| [JDK API Documentation (Javadoc)](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/) | 📋 API Ref | 🟡 | Language features, Concurrency, Data structures | Oracle | 🔄 | ✅ | ✅ | ☕ |
| [The Java Language Specification (JLS)](https://docs.oracle.com/javase/specs/jls/se21/html/index.html) | 📖 Docs | ⚫ | Language features, OOP, Generics, Concurrency, Memory | Oracle | 🔄 | ✅ | ✅ | ☕ |
| [Inside.java — Official Java Blog](https://inside.java/) | 📰 Blog | 🟡 | Language features, Concurrency, Memory | Oracle Java Team | 🔄 | ✅ | ✅ | ☕ |
| [The JVM Specification (JVMS)](https://docs.oracle.com/javase/specs/jvms/se21/html/index.html) | 📖 Docs | ⚫ | Memory management, Language features | Oracle | 🔄 | ✅ | ✅ | ☕ |
| [OpenJDK — Source Code & JEP Process](https://openjdk.org/) | 💻 Repo | 🔴 | Language features, Concurrency | OpenJDK Community | 🔄 | ✅ | ✅ | ☕ |
